candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related, but this is amortization of previously capitalized R&D and appears as a supplemental/below-EBIT disclosure rather than a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised development expenses - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense row is reported on the income statement. The only R&D-related label is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which is not a current-period R&D expense line.
